insight: a three-judge panel narrows the both-miss survivor set (majority 4/7 -> any-catch 6/7) and adds robustness over a single judge, but django-14311 survives even the any-catch rule and the detector, so a judge ensemble does not substitute for held-out execution; any-catch also trades away precision on legitimate code
next_action: add a third repo (non-math application) to grow the confirmed both-miss set beyond 7 and re-estimate the panel survivor rate with a measured precision cost on legitimate controls
